eventId.description: A unique identifier for the event.

eventType.description: The type of event being described.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the event occurred.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user related to the event.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user in the system.

metadata.description: Additional metadata related to the event.
